extra.reason: Completed: documented root-level M-1..5 attention jumps and jump-back binds with correct tmux-session-picker path, collision policy, and conflict notes.
Completed: added clear-cache subcommand, optional install.sh --tmux-hooks hook installer, README hook snippets, and contract coverage for cache clear/hooks.

Completed: session rows now render idle duration badges from session_activity, stale sessions are dimmed/sorted below active non-attention sessions by TMUX_PICKER_STALE_MINS, and contract tests cover formatter/list behavior.
Completed: Alt-x pane kill remains immediate; session kill now uses tmux command-prompt defaulting to cancel, with kill-confirm helper, README update, and contract tests.
Completed: Ctrl-n create picker over known/configured worktrees plus zoxide/~/.z recents, deterministic collision-safe session names, create-session flow, README docs, and contract coverage.
Completed: Alt-r command-prompt rename for sessions and pane windows, reload binding, README docs, and contract tests for rename helpers.
Completed: enabled fzf --multi with visible marker, Alt-X bulk-kill binding, bulk session confirmation/pane immediate handling, README docs, and contract tests.
Abandoned/reverted by operator request: Ctrl-n create flow caused confusing/noisy job/worktree enumeration; feature removed for now.
Completed: sp-* sessions now render below normal sessions under a specialists header; header preview/switch are safe no-ops; contract tests updated and passing.
Richer filters shipped: ctrl-f submenu with repo/branch/cmd/grep, list-active subcommand for robust fzf reloads, filter state survives cache invalidation. 25 unit + 15 integration tests, 72 pass.

Sessions-only nesting shipped: build_list accepts expanded/sessions-only mode, mode persisted in picker state, Tab toggles nesting, Space marks rows for bulk kill, list-active preserves active filter + mode, README/tests updated. make test: 75 pass, 0 fail.

Standardized @agent_* orchestration metadata: agent-state.sh now writes optional bead/task/prompt_file/parent_session env metadata plus automatic @agent_last_transition, off clears optional metadata, picker pane rows/previews consume metadata safely, docs/README/tests updated. Validation: bash -n scripts/bin/tests and make test (81 pass, 0 fail).

wait-agent shipped: resolves target to pane, polls @agent_state first with UI inference fallback, supports --timeout/--interval durations, exits when no longer working/running/busy/thinking, docs/README/tests updated. Validation: bash -n scripts/bin/tests and make test (87 pass, 0 fail).

safe-send-pointer shipped: dry-run exact tmux send-keys command by default, --yes sends, rejects working/running/busy/thinking targets, rejects multiline payloads and shell substitution/backticks, requires slash command or /tmp prompt-file pointer, docs/README/multiplexing skill/tests updated. Validation: bash -n scripts/bin/tests and make test (94 pass, 0 fail).

Bead-aware preview shipped: pane/session preview detects @agent_bead, shows bounded bd show context when available, degrades safely for missing/invalid/unavailable beads, docs/README/multiplexing skill/tests updated. Validation: bash -n scripts/bin/tests and make test (98 pass, 0 fail).

Worktree collision detector shipped: worktree-collisions reports shared git worktrees across live tmux sessions, list rows show informational [shared-wt] badge for affected sessions, docs/README/multiplexing skill/tests updated. Validation: bash -n scripts/bin/tests and make test (100 pass, 0 fail).

Preview enrichment substrate shipped: conservative derived-bead detection from dot-number session/path conventions, bounded bd show context, git-worktree dirty count and bounded diff-stat in pane/session previews. Validation: bash -n scripts/bin/tests, make test (106 pass, 0 fail), tmux smoke for derived bead + git preview.

Delegation dashboard shipped: dashboard sessions-only/expanded emits orchestrator-readable TSV with session/pane state, bead/task, repo/branch, dirty count, shared-worktree flag, idle age, and path. Consumes metadata/enrichment from prior mux/rib work. Validation: bash -n scripts/bin/tests, make test (109 pass, 0 fail), live dashboard smoke.

Timer registry shipped: monitor-agent starts registered background waits, monitor-list reports active target/pane/state/start/timeout/interval/updated, monitor-kill removes entries, completed monitors auto-clean. Validation: bash -n scripts/bin/tests, make test (112 pass, 0 fail), live monitor smoke.

Audit report shipped: audit is read-only and emits TSV warning rows (dirty/shared/working/no-bead/naming) separate from cleanup candidates (missing path/stale specialist). Validation: bash -n scripts/bin/tests, make test (113 pass, 0 fail), live audit smoke.

Assisted handoff shipped: handoff creates /tmp prompt-file for bead + meta-protocol, prints exact safe-send-pointer --yes command, refuses working targets before writing/sending, and sends only with explicit --yes. Validation: bash -n scripts/bin/tests, make test (115 pass, 0 fail), live handoff smoke.

Multiplexing help shipped: mux-help prints concise beads/tmp/send-keys, wait/monitor, handoff, dashboard/audit, keys, cleanup guidance; ? in picker changes preview to the cheatsheet; border labels advertise ? help. Validation: bash -n scripts/bin/tests, make test (116 pass, 0 fail), fzf bind smoke.

Epic complete: delivered multiplexing-safe orchestrator primitives across all 10 child tasks: @agent metadata, wait-agent, monitor registry, safe-send-pointer, handoff prompt workflow, bead-aware preview, worktree collision detection, dashboard TSV, audit report, and mux-help/? cheatsheet. Validation culminated in make test (116 pass, 0 fail) plus live tmux smoke tests.

README refreshed into complete xtmux capability reference: covers interactive picker, agent/git/specialist awareness, filters/nesting, multiplexing/orchestrator primitives, install/keys/CLI, metadata, preview enrichment, dashboard/audit, state/cache, tuning, testing, performance, status and roadmap. Validation: make test (116 pass, 0 fail).

Event log substrate shipped: local JSONL log with configurable XTMUX_EVENT_LOG_FILE/default state path, ts/ts_epoch/type, safe JSON escaping, and reusable log_event helper. Validation: make test (122 pass, 0 fail) + smoke log write.

Log CLI shipped: tmux-session-picker log emit/tail/query with filters for type, pane, session, bead, since, and limit over the JSONL event log. Validation: make test (122 pass, 0 fail) + smoke query/tail.

Instrumentation shipped: agent-state transitions write agent.state; safe-send/handoff/monitor/audit emit best-effort JSONL events without breaking primary flows. Validation: make test (122 pass, 0 fail) + real tmux agent-state smoke.

Message channel shipped: message-send/list/ack operate on xtmux JSONL events, support --for/--unacked and bead/from/to/text fields, avoiding capture-pane scraping or send-keys injection. Validation: make test (122 pass, 0 fail) + smoke send/list/ack.

multiplexing-team skill shipped in pi/Claude/xtrm skill locations. It teaches delegated panes to identify @agent_* metadata, read bead/prompt-file contracts, report via xtmux message channel + Beads, inspect siblings safely, use xtmux dashboard/log/audit/handoff primitives, and spawn specialists only with roll-up discipline. Validation: make test (122 pass, 0 fail).

Runtime turn-done publishing shipped for pi: extension listens for turn_end/agent_end, captures compact last assistant message, emits agent.turn.done, and sends short message.sent to @agent_parent_session when set. Existing global pi extension symlink points to repo file. Validation: tsc --noEmit for extension + make test (123 pass, 0 fail).

Optional git/bd/gh telemetry shipped: explicit opt-in wrapper tmux-session-picker telemetry <git|bd|gh> -- <args> logs command start and typed result events (git.commit/push/merge, bd.claim/update/close/remember/create, git.pr.create/merge) with exit code and tmux/bead context. It does not shadow commands automatically. Validation: make test (127 pass, 0 fail) + real git.commit smoke.

Epic complete: delivered team observability and messaging stack: JSONL event log, log emit/tail/query CLI, instrumentation for state/handoff/safe-send/monitor/audit, message-send/list/ack channel, delegated multiplexing-team skill in pi/Claude/xtrm, pi turn-done last-message publishing, and opt-in git/bd/gh telemetry wrappers. Validation: tsc extension + make test (127 pass, 0 fail) plus live log/message/agent-state/git.commit smokes.

Updated all installed /multiplexing skill copies with xtmux-team observability: event log queries, message channel, explicit git/bd/gh telemetry, and terminal layouts/commands for monitoring dashboard, monitor-list, audit, raw JSONL, messages, turn-done events, and telemetry. Validation: grep confirmed section in pi/Claude/xtrm copies.

Added scripts/xtmux-monitor.sh monitor terminal launcher with default 3-pane dashboard/monitor-audit/event-log layout and flags --full, --messages, --turns, --telemetry, --log, --interval, --audit-interval, --session, --kill-existing, --no-attach. install.sh now symlinks it as ~/.local/bin/xtmux-monitor; README and /multiplexing skill copies updated. Validation: make test (129 pass, 0 fail) + smoke created 3-pane tmux monitor session.

Safe ponytail cleanup complete: removed unused current_context_kvs helper and inlined single-use telemetry event classifiers into telemetry_run; removed classifier-only contract assertions while preserving wrapper behavior tests. Validation: bash syntax + tsc extension + make test (126 pass, 0 fail).

Smoke test completed with rich evidence. See xtmux-2i5 notes. Coordinator wiring end-to-end validated; chain dispatch blocked by pi runtime environment bugs (process tool PATH, sp CLI blocking despite async signal) — filed as xtmux-e1o and related. See v3 skill updated with correct sp semantics.
PostToolUse hook removed from ~/.claude/settings.json this session. Evidence: last N events in events.jsonl now show only PreToolUse, no PostToolUse. Ratio corrected.
Specialist explorer completed (job 7cf299)

Design + integration phase complete; all 3 PRs merged (#175/#362/#176) + xtmux b6b0453 pushed. Remaining fixes tracked as own beads (xtmux-7ob rebuild, xtmux-1hq delivery signal, xtmux-e1o scaffold, xtmux-19y upstream, xtmux-2dy 2nd core PR). This epic tracked design→integration; follow-up epics track fixes.
